name: wan-2-2
notes_low: Downloads the 5B TI2V model plus Fun 5B inpaint/control files for lower-VRAM text/image/video workflows.
notes_high: Adds 14B T2V/I2V, Fun Inpaint, and Fun Camera Control FP8 high/low-noise models plus LightX2V LoRAs.
description: Wan 2.2 video generation pack with T2V, I2V, inpaint, and camera-control workflows.
